channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [大V/权威] OpenAI and Google employees rush to Anthropic’s defense in DOD lawsuit
item.description:
📊 Score: 225 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ⭐A-Authority:openai(+70)
  • ⭐A-Authority:deepmind(+70)
  • ⭐A-Authority:anthropic(+70)
  • ❌Industry-Gate:fail(-30)

📄 Summary: More than 30 OpenAI and Google DeepMind employees signed onto a statement supporting Anthropic's lawsuit against the Defense Department after the agency labeled the AI firm a supply-chain risk, according to court filings....

item.title: [3] [大V/权威] OpenAI hardware exec Caitlin Kalinowski quits in response to Pentagon deal

📊 Score: 136 | Category: 大V/权威

📄 Summary: Hardware executive Caitlin Kalinowski announced today that in response to OpenAI's controversial agreement with the Department of Defense, she’s resigned from her role leading the company's robotics team....

item.title: [8] [模型算法] Causal Interpretation of Neural Network Computations with Contribution Decomposition
item.description:
📊 Score: 92 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • TimeFactor:×0.8

📄 Summary: Understanding how neural networks transform inputs into outputs is crucial for interpreting and manipulating their behavior. Most existing approaches analyze internal representations by identifying hidden-layer activation patterns correlated with human-interpretable concepts. Here we take a direct approach to examine how hidden neurons act to drive...

item.title: [9] [模型算法] Prosodic Boundary-Aware Streaming Generation for LLM-Based TTS with Streaming Text Input
item.description:
📊 Score: 92 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • TimeFactor:×0.8

📄 Summary: Streaming TTS that receives streaming text is essential for interactive systems, yet this scheme faces two major challenges: unnatural prosody due to missing lookahead and long-form collapse due to unbounded context. We propose a prosodic-boundary-aware post-training strategy, adapting a pretrained LLM-based TTS model using weakly time-aligned data...
